data.title: Quanzhou Huixin Tightens Controls After Clarifying Loan Terms
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Quanzhou Huixin Micro-credit Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1577) ) just unveiled an update.

Quanzhou Huixin Micro-credit has issued a further clarification regarding previously announced discloseable transactions related to the provision of financial assistance. The company corrected a clerical error to specify that two earlier loans each have a term of 365 days from the respective loan agreement dates.

The lender detailed that its updated internal control policies now cover both new loans and renewals and have been circulated across all departments. It will also bolster compliance by arranging targeted Listing Rules training and implementing a more rigorous, multi-step review and size-test process involving its business, risk management teams, external advisers and the board before loan approval and disclosure.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1577) stock is a Buy with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Quanzhou Huixin Micro-credit Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:1577 Stock Forecast page.

More about Quanzhou Huixin Micro-credit Co., Ltd. Class H

Quanzhou Huixin Micro-credit Co., Ltd. is a mainland China-based microfinance company listed in Hong Kong that provides loan and other financial assistance services. Its business focuses on originating and renewing small-scale loans, operating under the regulatory framework of the Hong Kong Listing Rules while serving borrowers in the micro-credit segment.

Average Trading Volume: 275,882

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$680M

data.title: Li Auto’s March Deliveries Top 41,000 as New EV Models and AI Tech Gain Momentum
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Li Auto, Inc. Class A ( (HK:2015) ) has shared an update.

Li Auto reported March 2026 deliveries of 41,053 vehicles, bringing cumulative deliveries to 1,635,357 since it began volume production. The company has built a sizeable physical footprint, operating 517 retail stores in 160 cities, 552 service centers and authorized shops in 223 cities, and 4,057 super charging stations with 22,439 charging stalls across China.

With production bottlenecks resolved, the Li i6 surpassed 24,000 monthly deliveries in March, underscoring strong demand for its latest battery electric SUV. The company also plans to launch an all-new Li L9 in the second quarter of 2026 and has unveiled its MindVLA autonomous driving foundation model with a 3D ViT Encoder, signaling continued investment in advanced driving technologies and reinforcing its competitive position in China’s premium NEV segment.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2015) stock is a Hold with a HK$63.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Li Auto, Inc. Class A stock, see the HK:2015 Stock Forecast page.

More about Li Auto, Inc. Class A

Li Auto Inc. is a leading player in China’s new energy vehicle market, focusing on designing, developing, manufacturing, and selling premium smart electric vehicles for family use. The company pioneered the commercialization of extended-range electric vehicles in China and is simultaneously building platforms for battery electric vehicles to broaden its user base.

Its product portfolio includes a high-tech flagship family MPV, four Li L series extended-range electric SUVs, and two Li i series battery electric SUVs, with volume production having started in late 2019. Li Auto concentrates on in-house development of range extension systems, innovative EV technologies, and smart vehicle solutions, supported by a growing nationwide network of retail stores, service centers, and fast-charging infrastructure.

Average Trading Volume: 12,231,506

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$138.2B

data.title: Zegona Confirms Total Voting Rights Following Vodafone Spain Acquisition
data.description:

The latest update is out from Zegona Communications ( (GB:ZEG) ).

Zegona Communications has confirmed that, as of 31 March 2026, its issued share capital consists of 228,633,802 ordinary shares of 1 pence each, with no shares held in treasury. This means the company’s total voting rights also stand at 228,633,802, a key reference figure that shareholders and other investors must use when assessing whether they need to disclose holdings or changes in their positions under U.K. transparency rules.

The clarified share capital and voting rights position provides the market with an updated denominator for regulatory reporting and stake-building notifications in Zegona. This disclosure supports transparency for investors following the company’s recent expansion, including its acquisition of Vodafone Spain, and helps ensure orderly monitoring of significant shareholdings in the stock.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ZEG) stock is a Buy with a £2300.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zegona Communications stock, see the GB:ZEG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ZEG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ZEG is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong cash flow generation but constrained by high leverage and ongoing net losses. Technicals are supportive with a clear uptrend, though momentum indicators are stretched. Valuation impact is limited because P/E and dividend yield were not provided.

To see Spark’s full report on ZEG stock, click here.

More about Zegona Communications

Zegona Communications is a publicly listed investment company on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange, focused on the European telecommunications, media and technology sector. Established in 2015 and led by former Virgin Media executives Eamonn O’Hare and Robert Samuelson, it targets underperforming assets to enhance operational performance and shareholder returns. In 2024, Zegona expanded its footprint by completing the acquisition of Vodafone Spain, deepening its presence in the European telecoms market.

Current Market Cap: £3.75B

Ocado Group ( (GB:OCDO) ) has shared an announcement.

Ocado Group plc has confirmed that as of 31 March 2026 it has 841,898,939 issued ordinary shares of 2 pence each admitted to trading, with each share carrying one vote at general meetings and no shares held in treasury. The group notes that 10,604,389 shares held within its employee benefit structures are treated as treasury shares for accounting purposes and excluded from earnings per share calculations, meaning the aggregate voting rights effectively available to shareholders stand at 831,294,550.

The company highlighted that the total voting rights figure of 841,898,939 should be used by investors and other stakeholders as the denominator for regulatory threshold calculations under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules. This clarification provides the market with an updated capital and voting base, offering transparency around the treatment of employee share schemes and ensuring accurate reporting of changes in significant shareholdings.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:OCDO) stock is a Hold with a £192.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ocado Group stock, see the GB:OCDO Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OCDO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by volatile operating profitability and clear technical weakness (price below key moving averages with negative momentum). Offsetting factors include improving cash flow trends and a low P/E, while the earnings call adds moderate support via a detailed plan toward cash generation but with notable debt and execution risks.

To see Spark’s full report on OCDO stock, click here.

More about Ocado Group

Ocado Group plc is a U.K.-based online grocery technology and retail company that develops automated warehousing, robotics, and software solutions for grocery fulfilment. It operates both its own online grocery platform and supplies end-to-end e-commerce and logistics technology to supermarket partners internationally, focusing on high-volume, data-driven retail operations.

data.title: Shenzhen Expressway Posts Unaudited February 2026 Toll Revenue, Urges Caution on Preliminary Data
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Shenzhen Expressway Co ( (HK:0548) ) is now available.

Shenzhen Expressway Corporation Limited reported unaudited toll revenue figures for February 2026 across its portfolio of expressways in Shenzhen, other parts of Guangdong and several other mainland provinces, with projects such as the Coastal Project, Outer Ring Project, Qinglian Expressway and GS Expressway among the largest contributors by monthly and average daily toll income. The company highlighted that nine days of holiday toll-free policies for small passenger vehicles affected collections during the month and cautioned investors that the published figures are preliminary, may differ from final periodic report data due to estimation and settlement adjustments, and should be used only as interim reference statistics.

While the disclosure offers investors a timely snapshot of operational performance and traffic trends across individual projects, Shenzhen Expressway emphasized that inter-network toll collection mechanisms and ongoing revisions to monthly forecasts can introduce deviations in project-level numbers, underscoring the need for cautious interpretation when assessing short-term revenue volatility. The announcement, signed by the company secretary on behalf of the board, reinforces transparency around monthly toll trends but also signals that more definitive performance assessments will depend on audited and fully reconciled financial reporting later in the year.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0548) stock is a Hold with a HK$8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shenzhen Expressway Co stock, see the HK:0548 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shenzhen Expressway Co

Shenzhen Expressway Corporation Limited is a PRC-based toll road operator focused on developing, operating and managing expressways and related infrastructure, primarily in Guangdong province, including the Shenzhen region, and in selected other provinces such as Hunan, Hubei and Jiangsu. Its portfolio comprises wholly owned and joint venture expressways and bridge projects that generate revenue from toll collections, positioning the company as a key regional transport infrastructure player supporting intra- and inter-provincial traffic flows.

Average Trading Volume: 2,045,640

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$24.59B

See more data about 0548 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from SiteMinder Limited ( (AU:SDR) ).

Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group has filed a notice indicating it has ceased to be a substantial shareholder in SiteMinder Limited, following a series of trades in the company’s fully paid ordinary shares. The change reflects adjustments in holdings via entities controlled by First Sentier Group and Morgan Stanley, suggesting a rebalancing of institutional exposure to the hotel-tech provider without disclosing a specific strategic rationale.

The transactions on 26 March 2026 comprised multiple sales and purchases of SiteMinder shares, with the net effect reducing Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group’s relevant interest below the substantial holding threshold. For SiteMinder investors, the move marks a shift in the company’s institutional register but does not, on the information provided, signal any direct change to the company’s operations or strategic direction.

SiteMinder Limited is an Australia-based technology company that provides software solutions for the hotel and accommodation sector. Its platforms focus on distribution, channel management and related tools that help hotels manage room inventory, pricing and online bookings across multiple channels globally.
